name: gh-contribution-planner
description: Daily GitHub contribution planner — analyzes the gh-logged-in user's non-archived repos (forks + sources) and recent contributions, produces a prioritized plan, then dispatches parallel sub-agents to execute approved items via existing PR/CI/review skills.
author: dots-ai

copilot-cli.notes: Parallel sub-agent dispatch falls back to sequential execution when the host lacks a Task-like primitive.
